title: Internet Capitalism Data Reaper
lede: Attention-only decks are overplayed. Owned monetization, vertical software, and outcome-selling services are the format. Hybrids beat pure single-class lists. Open a playbook for the exact steps.

metaBreaker.headline: Meta Breaker: service-as-software
metaBreaker.lede: Selling the outcome (leads booked, hours saved, cash recovered) is beating pure tool shops and vague AI agency project work. Same skill stack, cleaner offer, stickier retainers.
bullets: Vertical + measurable ROI for SMBs, not horizontal AI wrappers
Retainer economics closer to SaaS than freelance gigs
Ladder: freelance automation to productized outcome to software

matchups.name: Attention stack
matchups.note: Short-form discovers. Email owns. Product pays.

matchups.name: Depth stack
matchups.note: YouTube builds trust. Newsletter captures. Course or consulting monetizes.

matchups.name: Skill ladder
matchups.note: Gigs fund the runway. Productize the offer. Scale to outcome retainers.

matchups.name: Arbitrage stack
matchups.note: SEO captures intent. Lead gen monetizes. SaaS is the long wincon.

matchups.name: UGC ladder
matchups.note: Clip for hire, then productize content, then retainers or a niche agency.

matchups.name: Owned recurring
matchups.note: List first, community second, high-ticket for the few who want more.

matchups.name: Software ladder
matchups.note: Tiny tool proves demand. Micro-SaaS captures recurring. Sales skill compounds everything.

matchups.name: Agency to product
matchups.note: AI project work funds learning. Outcome retainers stabilize. Product is the exit ramp.
